title: Figure 1 from: Bellot S, Renner S (2014) The systematics of the worldwide endoparasite family Apodanthaceae (Cucurbitales), with a key, a map, and color photos of most species. PhytoKeys 36: 41-57. https://doi.org/10.3897/phytokeys.36.7385
author: Bellot, Sidonie
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1 - Phylogenetic relationships in Apodanthaceae obtained under maximum likelihood from the mitochondrial gene matR (A) and the nuclear ribosomal RNA gene 18S (B). Shown in red are the specimens we wanted to identify to species. Numbers indicate bootstrap support >70%.
steps_raw: Figure 1 - Phylogenetic relationships in Apodanthaceae obtained under maximum likelihood from the mitochondrial gene matR (A) and the nuclear ribosomal RNA gene 18S (B). Shown in red are the specimens we wanted to identify to species. Numbers indicate bootstrap support >70%.
